GitHubApiData.name: acexy
GitHubApiData.description: Acexy (AceStream Proxy) is a proxy for multiplexing connections to the AceStream Engine

TranslatedDescriptions.zh-CN: Acexy（AceStream代理）是一个用于多路复用连接到AceStream引擎的代理。
TranslatedDescriptions.ja: Acexy（AceStream Proxy）は、AceStreamエンジンへの接続を多重化するためのプロキシです。
TranslatedDescriptions.ko: Acexy(AceStream 프록시)는 AceStream 엔진에 대한 연결을 다중화하는 프록시입니다.
TranslatedDescriptions.en: Acexy (AceStream Proxy) is a proxy for multiplexing connections to the AceStream Engine.
TranslatedDescriptions.es: Acexy (AceStream Proxy) es un proxy para multiplexar conexiones al AceStream Engine.
TranslatedDescriptions.fr: Acexy (AceStream Proxy) est un proxy pour le multiplexage des connexions vers le moteur AceStream.
